      • collectValues(values: var ValuesTable; argName: string; val: sink string; arg)
        printError
      • printError(msg: KapsisErrorMessage; arg: varargs[string])

Types

CmdArgValueType = enum
  ktString = "string", ktBool = "bool", ktInt = "int", ktFloat = "float",
  ktFile = "file", ktPath = "path", ktFilename = "filename",
  ktFilepath = "filepath", ktDir = "dir", ktMilliseconds = "miliseconds",
  ktSeconds = "seconds", ktMinutes = "minutes", ktHours = "hours",
  ktDays = "days", ktMonths = "months", ktYears = "years", ktJson = "json",
  ktYaml = "yaml", ktUrl = "url", ktPort = "port", ktIdent = "ident"
The actual value types that will be used at runtime for parsing command line arguments 
KapsisErrorMessage = enum
  unknownOption = "Unknown option: $1", unknownCommand = "Unknown command: $1",
  unexpectedOption = "Unexpected option: $1",
  typeMismatch = "Type mismatch for `$1`. Expected $2",
  missingArgument = "Missing required argument: $1"

A list of possible error messages that can be thrown by Kapsis at runtime when parsing user's input or when executing commands

It can be used to create i18n error messages in different languages

KapsisPath = object
  file*: FileInfo
  path*: string
The KapsisPath object that will hold the parsed value of a file or directory argument 
Value = object
  case
  of ktString:
  of ktBool:
  of ktInt:
  of ktFloat:
  of ktFile:
  of ktPath:
  of ktFilename:
  of ktFilepath:
  of ktDir:
  of ktMilliseconds:
  of ktSeconds:
  of ktMinutes:
  of ktHours:
  of ktDays:
  of ktMonths:
  of ktYears:
  of ktJson:
  of ktYaml:
  of ktUrl:
  of ktPort:
  of ktIdent:
The Value object that will hold the parsed value of a command line argument at runtime 
Values = ptr ValuesTable
A pointer to a table that will hold the parsed values of the command line arguments 
ValuesTable = OrderedTable[string, Value]
The table that will hold the parsed values of the command line arguments

Procs

proc getBool(value: Value): lent bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get vBool from Value 
proc getDays(value: Value): lent Duration {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get vJson from Value

    forbids: [].}
Get vMilliseconds from Value

Get vMinutes from Value 
proc getMonths(value: Value): lent Duration {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc getPath(value: Value): lent KapsisPath {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get vPath from Value

Get vStr from Value 
proc getUrl(value: Value): lent Uri {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get vYaml from Value 
proc getYears(value: Value): lent Duration {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get vYears from Value

Templates

template collectValues(values: var ValuesTable; argName: string;
                       val: sink string; arg)
This template is used to collect and parse the command line arguments passed by the user at runtime. 
template printError(msg: KapsisErrorMessage; arg: varargs[string])
Print msg error with args and quit with QuitFailure exit code
